mnemonics.title: Allocation Methods
mnemonics.content: Cats Like Ice: Contiguous (fragmentation), Linked (no fragmentation but slow random access), Indexed (fast random access but overhead)

mnemonics.title: UNIX i-node Pointer Levels
mnemonics.content: Direct, Single, Double, Triple: Don't Sit Down There - helps remember the order and that each level adds more indirection

mnemonics.title: Free Space Management Techniques
mnemonics.content: Big Lions Growl Constantly: Bit vector, Linked list, Grouping, Counting - helps remember the four main techniques
